mapper.select:
select
, subject , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(deleted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(trashed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , time_duration_ms , file_org_nm , file_new_nm from tb_cs_test WHERE file_org_nm = #{orgnm}

select as seq , subject , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , deleted_at as deletedAt , trashed_at as trashedAt , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm , file_conv_nm as fileConvNm , remark , file_size_bytes as fileSizeBytes , tc_user_seq as tcUserSeq from tb_cs_test WHERE > 0 AND trashed_at is null order by seq

select seq as seq , start , end , reliability , stt_text as sttText , meet_text as meetText , train_text as trainText , test_seq as testSeq , -1 as meetingSeq , -1 as soundSeq , use_yn as useYn , data_id as dataId , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt from tb_cs_test_trans order by seq
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_cs_test set trashed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where seq not in ( SELECT distinct(test_seq) FROM tb_cs_test_trans WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ) and trashed_at is null
UPDATE tb_cs_test set trashed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where seq not in ( SELECT distinct(test_seq) FROM tb_cs_test_trans WHERE use_yn = 'N' ) and trashed_at is null

UPDATE tb_cs_test_trans_pair SET model_id = '' WHERE seq in
#{item}
mapper.select: select data_id as dataId , seq as seq , train_text as trainText , use_yn as useYn from tb_cs_test_trans_pair where data_id = #{dataId}

select seq as seq , subject , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(deleted_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(trashed_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm from tb_cs_test WHERE seq = #{meetSeq}

select seq as seq , start , end , reliability , stt_text as sttText , ifnull(train_text, '') as trainText , test_seq as testSeq , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , use_yn as useYn from tb_cs_test_trans WHERE seq = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_cs_test_trans set test_seq = -1 , use_yn = 'N' where seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(a.cnt) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tb_cs_trans_pair WHERE model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id = '' union SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tb_cs_test_trans_pair WHERE model_id IS NOT NULL AND model_id = '' ) a

select seq , start , end , reliability , trim(IF(train_text IS NULL or train_text = '', stt_text, train_text)) as trainText , data_id AS dataId , use_yn as useYn from tb_cs_test_trans where data_id is not null and data_id != '' order by data_id

select ss.seq as seq , ss.subject , ss.created_at as createdAt , ss.updated_at as updatedAt , ss.deleted_at as deletedAt , ss.trashed_at as trashedAt , ss.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , ss.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , ss.click_least_once as clickLeastOnce , ss.reliability , ss.stt_started_at as sttStartedAt , ss.file_stereo_prefix as fileStereoPrefix , ss.channel_count as channelCount , ( SELECT count(s.seq) from tb_cs_test s WHERE s.seq > 0
AND s.created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{search.searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( s.status = '10' or s.status = '20' )
AND s.deleted_at is null AND s.trashed_at is null
AND s.deleted_at is null AND s.trashed_at is not null
AND s.subject like CONCAT('%',#{search.searchText},'%')
AND s.seq = #{seq}
) AS hiddenCount , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_cs_test_trans ct WHERE ct.test_seq = ss.seq AND ct.train_text IS NOT NULL AND ct.train_text != '' ) AS trainTextCount from tb_cs_test ss WHERE ss.seq > 0
AND ss.created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{search.searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( ss.status = '10' or ss.status = '20' )
AND ss.deleted_at is null AND ss.trashed_at is null
AND ss.deleted_at is null AND ss.trashed_at is not null
AND ss.subject like CONCAT('%',#{search.searchText},'%')
AND ss.seq = #{seq}
order by ss.created_at desc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_cs_test ( division ,subject ,time_duration_ms ,file_org_nm ,file_new_nm ,file_conv_nm ,file_size_bytes ,tc_user_seq ,reliability ) select '00' ,subject ,time_duration_ms ,file_org_nm ,#{fileNewNm} ,#{fileConvNm} ,file_size_bytes ,#{userSeq} ,reliability from TB_CS_MEETING where seq = #{seq}

insert into tb_cs_test ( division ,subject ,time_duration_ms ,file_org_nm ,file_new_nm ,file_conv_nm ,file_size_bytes ,tc_user_seq ,reliability ) select '00' ,subject ,time_duration_ms ,file_org_nm ,#{fileNewNm} ,#{fileConvNm} ,file_size_bytes ,#{userSeq} ,reliability from tb_cs_sound where seq = #{seq}

insert into tb_cs_test_trans ( start , end , reliability , stt_text , meet_text , train_text , test_seq , channel_id ) select start , end , reliability , stt_text , meet_text , train_text , #{testSeq} , channel_id from tb_cs_transcription where meeting_seq = #{seq}

insert into tb_cs_test_trans ( start , end , reliability , stt_text , meet_text , train_text , test_seq , channel_id ) select start , end , reliability , stt_text , meet_text , train_text , #{testSeq} , channel_id from tb_cs_transcription where sound_seq = #{seq}
